title: [Sylinar's Spire, Bed Chamber]
description: Dim light presses through tightly shuttered windows, leaving the chamber in muted shadows.  Sheets of draped cloth cover most furnishings, their folds tucked close as if prepared for long storage.  Along one wall, unlabeled crates are stacked in careful rows, their surfaces clean and undisturbed.  A low bed rests beneath its covering nearby, its mattress tightly rolled and bound with heavy straps.
